title: PortSwigger: OAuth Vulnerabilities
attack_vector:
Web Security Academy
OAuth authentication
OAuth 2.0 authentication vulnerabilities
While browsing the web, you've almost certainly come across sites that let you log in using your social media account. The chances are that this feature is built using the popular OAuth 2.0 framework. OAuth 2.0 is highly interesting for attackers because it is both extremely common and inherently prone to implementation mistakes. This can result in a number of vulnerabilities, allowing attackers to obtain sensitiv
impact: Attacker could exploit command injection vulnerability
